compiled_state.author: Iso Tester

comments.author: Iso Tester
comments.body: Root cause (proven, joe-debug): 3 stale probe assertions. (1) line 145 'edit $BUG --tags=probe,edited' -> engine now errors exit 1 'Error: --tags is no longer an edit field. Use --set-tags / --add-tag / --remove-tag' (confirmed in isolated store). (2) line 147 'edit priority persisted' fails as COLLATERAL: --tags makes the whole edit command error before priority persists. (3) line 276 'show and list element have identical key sets' fails because show legitimately includes 'comments'+'description' keys that list omits by design (confirmed: comm shows exactly {comments, description} present in show, absent in list). Fix: line 145 use --set-tags; line 276 assert list-keys are a subset of show-keys (or that the only diff is comments+description), not identical.

comments.author: Iso Tester
comments.body: Resolved in PR #93 (commit d755bfe4e). scripts/probe-rebar.sh: line ~146 edit now uses --set-tags=probe,edited (was removed --tags); priority assertion passes as a result; the show/list keyset assertion replaced with subset + exact-extra ([comments,description]) checks. Verified against current engine in an isolated store: 142 passed, 0 failed (was 138 passed, 3 failed).

compiled_state.description:
# scripts/probe-rebar.sh has 3 stale assertions vs the current engine

## What
The release smoke probe reports 3 failures that are NOT engine defects — the probe
script tests behavior the engine intentionally changed. Surfaced during the 0.6.0
release smoke test (138 passed, 3 failed).

## Reproduction Steps
1. Init an isolated store with a current rebar build.
2. `REBAR_ROOT=<store> PROBE_LIVE=1 bash scripts/probe-rebar.sh`.
3. Observe 3 failures unrelated to engine correctness.

Expected: probe asserts only current, supported behavior (0 spurious failures).
Actual: 3 failures from stale expectations.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `scripts/probe-rebar.sh` line ~146: stop using removed `edit --tags`; use
      `--set-tags`/`--add-tag`/`--remove-tag` (per CLAUDE.md tag-delta surface).
- [ ] Line ~147 priority assertion passes once the edit command no longer errors.
- [ ] Line ~276 keyset assertion accounts for `show` including `comments`+`description`
      that `list` omits by design (don't assert identical key sets).
- [ ] Full probe prints `N passed, 0 failed` against the current engine.

file_impact.reason: fix 3 stale assertions: --tags->--set-tags; show/list keyset subset

compiled_state.title: probe-rebar.sh: 3 stale assertions (edit --tags removed; show/list keyset)

verify_commands.command: REBAR_ROOT=$(mktemp -d) bash -c 'cd $REBAR_ROOT && git init -q && git commit -q --allow-empty -m i; rebar init; PROBE_LIVE=1 bash scripts/probe-rebar.sh'
verify_commands.dd_text: probe prints 0 failed against current engine
